steps.title: Discriminant shortcut: one solution means $\Delta = 0$
steps.content: Use the discriminant when the question is really asking how many real solutions a quadratic has. The sign of $b^2-4ac$ tells whether there are two, one, or no real solutions. For $-3x^{2} + 24x + c = 0$, identify $a = -3$, $b = 24$. Set $b^{2} - 4ac = 0$:
